features: Vitamin C, an antioxidant helps fight harmful free radicals generated from pollution and sun rays, prevent skin damage and known to improve the skin’s overall appearance
Vitamin C is known to brighten skin and evens skin-tone
The skin conditioning and astringent properties of Orange helps to overcome dullness by reducing excess oiliness on the skin and improve skin’s overall appearance.
Natural cellulose beads delicately remove deep seated impurities
Skin Friendly pH, dermatologically tested, 96% natural origin ingredients
description: Product Description Himalaya Brightening Vitamin C Orange Face Wash is power packed with Vitamin C that helps boost your skin’s natural radiance. This face wash cleanses and hydrates, leaving your skin visibly brighter and revitalized. Ingredients Aqua, Ammonium Lauryl Sulfate, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Fragrance, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Titanium Dioxide, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Hydroxide, Citrus Reticulata (Tangerine) Peel Extract, Menthol, Ascorbyl Glucoside, Niacinamide, Citric acid, Disodium EDTA, Benzophenone-4, CI 15985, CI 14700. Directions Moisten face and neck; Apply a small amount of Brightening Orange Face Wash with Vitamin C and gently massage the lather in with circular motions. Wash and dry. Use twice a day. Products that contain herbs tend to change color over time. However, the efficacy of the product remains unchanged Safety Warning Store in a cool and dry place, away from heat and sunlight.
